pattern: Greedily absorb all large enemies to grow energy, then repeatedly defeat the weakest remaining enemy to earn maximum points.
hints: If currentEnergy is 0 you can never defeat any enemy — if you cannot defeat even the weakest one, the answer is 0.
To maximize points, spend energy defeating the cheapest enemy (minimum energy cost), then absorb all others to refill energy.

Once the minimum-cost enemy is chosen, every defeat costs that minimum and energy gained equals the sum of all absorbed enemies; the total points are bounded by the floor division of accumulated energy by the minimum.

edge_inputs.description: single enemy, enough energy to defeat multiple times
cannot defeat any enemy — energy is 0
current energy too low to defeat even the weakest — answer is 0
single enemy, minimum energy equals currentEnergy
absorbing gives massive energy for many defeats
one very cheap enemy amid many expensive ones

stress.description: random enemy arrays with random starting energy
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    enemies = [rng.randint(1, 10**9) for _ in range(max(1, size))]
    energy = rng.randint(0, 10**9)
    return [enemies, energy]
